species: CME disrupts cardiac function and GSH homeostasis in rats
tissue: CME induced myocardial injury by disturbing GSH homeostasis
cell_type: hypoxia-stimulated cardiomyocytes were used to simulate CME in vitro
disease_state: CME induces myocardial injury by disturbing GSH homeostasis
sample_source: Serum and heart samples were collected 24 h after CME induction
age: Three-month-old male Sprague-Dawley rats (weighing approximately 300 g)
cell_line: H9c2 cardiomyocytes were purchased from the American Type Culture Collection
